positive: A detailed, high-contrast illustration of a majestic, stylized forest animal, such as a howling wolf or a leaping fox, rendered in a neo-traditional tattoo art style. The composition should feature the central silhouette of the animal against a complex, symmetrical background of stylized flora (ferns, moons, stars) and delicate watercolor wash elements. Use a limited, rich color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, emerald green, and bone white. The lines must be sharp, clean, and graphic, suitable for printing on fabric. The overall mood should be mystical and powerful. Central, symmetrical composition, vector quality, clean edges, full body focus.
negative: blur, sketch, signature, watermark, text, logo, grainy, artifacts, messy, low quality, bad anatomy, distorted, extra limbs, noise
